query:
UPDATE test_profiles tp 
JOIN projects p ON tp.project_id COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci = CAST(p.id AS CHAR) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci
SET tp.project_id = p.uid
WHERE tp.project_id REGEXP '^[0-9]+$';
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2YbtCA1K2KM9KYv.5dd22857b677 --database FxhMG2t4EnV6hSi7hwzAaR --execute UPDATE test_profiles tp

SET tp.project_id = p.uid
WHERE tp.project_id REGEXP '^[0-9]+$';
